product_name: Zebra RFID Reader Local REST API
data_coverage_summary: The local REST API exposes Zebra RFID reader identity, capabilities, operational status, statistics, and configuration endpoints, along with write-capable routes for network, certificates, apps, LEDs, and GPO state.
buyer_guidance: Use the local REST API when you need both reader inventory or health data and controlled local management actions on Zebra RFID infrastructure.
overview: The Zebra RFID local REST API includes reader metadata and capabilities, operational statistics and status, and multiple write-capable configuration surfaces such as network settings, certificates, apps, logs, LEDs, and GPO state. That makes it a full asset, telemetry, and writeback API for local reader management. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Supported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: The local REST surface combines observability and local administration for RFID readers.
data_points: LED, app, log, and GPO control endpoints

ingest_considerations: Because the API is local and write-capable, network placement and credential handling are part of the integration design, not just the data model.
Administrative actions such as certificate, network, and app changes should be isolated behind privileged workflows.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Classification is based on the Zebra local REST reference plus the downloadable IoT Reader API Collection Local Rest Postman artifact, which documents the reader metadata, statistics, configuration, and control routes surfaced by the page.
